item.title: Major Excavator Recovery Operation
item.description: Pepe's Towing handles a large excavator recovery with careful coordination, equipment use, and roadside safety throughout the operation

media:content.media:title: Major Excavator Recovery Operation
media:content.media:description: Pepe's Towing handles a large excavator recovery with careful coordination, equipment use, and roadside safety throughout the operation

item.title: The Man Behind the Towing Work
item.description: A look at the person behind the towing and recovery work, highlighting teamwork, equipment, and professional roadside support

media:content.media:title: The Man Behind the Towing Work
media:content.media:description: A look at the person behind the towing and recovery work, highlighting teamwork, equipment, and professional roadside support

item.title: Extreme Lift Recovery Operation
item.description: Pepe's Towing handles a challenging lift and recovery with careful coordination, equipment use, and roadside safety procedures.

media:content.media:title: Extreme Lift Recovery Operation
media:content.media:description: Pepe's Towing handles a challenging lift and recovery with careful coordination, equipment use, and roadside safety procedures.

item.title: G63 AMG Used for Towing Work
item.description: A G63 AMG is put to work in towing operations, showing a unique approach to vehicle recovery and roadside support.

media:content.media:title: G63 AMG Used for Towing Work
media:content.media:description: A G63 AMG is put to work in towing operations, showing a unique approach to vehicle recovery and roadside support.
